scripts.test:clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); ['test_images', 'test_coordinates.xlsx', 'temp/metadata.csv'].forEach(f => { const p = path.join(__dirname, f); if (fs.existsSync(p)) fs.rmSync(p, { recursive: true, force: true }); }); console.log('Test files cleaned up');"
